BUNDLE INSPECT

Header
  File:                  <bundle>
  Size:                  <size> bytes
  Bundle digest:         <digest>
  Bundle schema:         1
  Lock schema:           2
  Agent:                 bundle-test-agent@0.1.0

Integrity
  manifest_parse      PASS  manifest parsed
  manifest_signature  PASS  manifest signature valid
  publisher_match     PASS  manifest and lock publisher match
  lock_provenance     PASS  lock and provenance verified
  content_sha256      PASS  lock, policy, and sbom digests match manifest
  policy_digest       PASS  policy digest matches lock
  sbom_digest         PASS  sbom digest matches lock
  source_digest       PASS  source digest matches manifest and lock
  image_digest        PASS  no image in bundle

Publisher
  Name:        test-publisher
  Fingerprint: <fingerprint>
  A valid signature proves who signed this and that it is unmodified.
  It does not mean the agent is safe. Review the policy below.

Provenance:
  1. created  bundle-test-agent 0.1.0  by test-publisher  (<fp8>)  1970-01-01


Policy summary
  [egress] api.example.com:443 *
  [credential] id=my-key type=header header=X-API-Key

Requirements
  Platform:    linux/arm64
  LLM:         (not declared)
  Image:       rebuild required (source in bundle; no prebuilt image)
  Credentials:
    - my-key (header) header=X-API-Key

SBOM
  Packages: 2
  Top-level deps: idna, requests
